title: Create: First Machine
description:
Your copper tools can only take you so far. To reach iron tools, you'll need §lautomation§r.

The key gate is the §lSilent Gear Anvil§r — a specialized crafting station. Its recipe is expensive and requires a §lCreate Mechanical Press§r to assemble.

Start with the basics:
1. Gather §landesite§r, §lzinc§r, and §lcopper§r
2. Craft §landesite alloy§r
3. Build a §lWater Wheel§r for power
4. Craft a §lMechanical Press§r

This is Create's §lAndesite Age§r — the foundation of everything you'll build later.
